M0300E1 Unstageable Pressure Ulcer Due To Dressing Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the current number of unstageable pressure ulcers due to non-removable dressing or device. 0 Minimum
9 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
^ Blank (skip pattern)
423 M0300E2_U_ULCR_DRSNG_ADMSN_NUM M0300E2_U_ULCR_DRSNG_ADMSN_NUM M0300E2 Unstageable Pressure Ulcer Due To Dressing on Admission Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the current number of unstageable pressure ulcers due
